name: Stafford North
description:
Stafford North covers the areas of Tillington, Holmcroft and the Common. The neighbourhood is supported by an active parish council, and has adjoining marshes, belonging to the Wildlife Trust, with public footpaths, pools and ponds.

Sites of historic railway track give walkers access to other local beauty spots while a residential area provides a host of local amenities including shops, a post office, junior and senior schools. The area has a number of residents' associations and a very active Neighbourhood Watch.
